/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/pediasense_app.dir/main.cc.o CMakeFiles/pediasense_app.dir/my_application.cc.o CMakeFiles/pediasense_app.dir/__/flutter/generated_plugin_registrant.cc.o -o ../intermediates_do_not_run/pediasense_app  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/apple/Documents/PlatformIO/Projects/PediaSense/flutter_app/linux/build/plugins/gtk -Wl,-rpath,/Users/apple/Documents/PlatformIO/Projects/PediaSense/flutter_app/linux/build/plugins/url_launcher_linux ../plugins/gtk/libgtk_plugin.dylib ../plugins/url_launcher_linux/liburl_launcher_linux_plugin.dylib /Users/apple/Documents/PlatformIO/Projects/PediaSense/flutter_app/linux/flutter/ephemeral/libflutter_linux_gtk.so
